metadata.reference: T. Amotchkina, M. Trubetskov, D. Hahner, V. Pervak. Characterization of e-beam evaporated Ge, YbF3, ZnS, and LaF3 thin films for laser-oriented coatings. Appl. Opt. 59, A40-A47 (2020) (Data kindly provided by Tatiana Amotchkina [data] [description])
metadata.comments: 0.42 µm Ge<sub>3</sub> film deposited on 1 mm thick ZnSe substratee by e-beam evaporation at 120 °C substrate temperature.
